summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of CREW endurance athlete matching platform. All major features working correctly with Supabase integration.
passed_tests: Home page renders with hero section, profile cards, marquee, sport cards, featured athletes, events teaser, Grape Labs CTA band
Navigation links work correctly (How It Works, Find a Partner, Events, About)
Theme toggle (sun/moon icon) switches between dark and light mode successfully
Events page loads real data from Supabase with working filter chips (All/Hyrox/Marathon/Ironman)
How It Works page renders with timeline steps and FAQ accordion functionality
About page renders with Grape Labs AI section and working CTAs
Get Started page shows auth form (email + phone) when not logged in with proper validation
Privacy Policy page renders full text content
Terms page renders full text content
Protected routes (/find-a-partner, /my-connections, /profile/edit) correctly redirect to /get-started when not logged in
Footer renders with Grape Labs AI SVG logo and all working links
CREW wordmark logo in nav links to home page
'by Grape Labs AI' links correctly to https://www.grapelabs.in
Sport cards (HYROX, MARATHON, IRONMAN) have CTAs linking to /find-a-partner with sport parameters
Mobile responsive design works with hamburger menu functionality
All Grape Labs AI links point to correct external URL
Event cards display real Supabase data with working 'Find Partners' and 'Share' buttons
Form validation working on Get Started page
FAQ accordion functionality working on How It Works page
Event filter functionality working on Events page
